description:
Machine-friendly manifest describing common `uv` commands and agent usage policies for this project.
Brief: prefer `uv` for installs, env management, and running project scripts.
agent_policy: Prefer `uv` for installs, environment management, and running scripts. When adding/removing dependencies, run `uv lock` then `uv sync`. Avoid direct `pip`/`python` unless `uv` is unavailable.

commands.name: add
commands.summary: Add a dependency to the project

commands.name: sync
commands.summary: Install/update the environment from the lockfile

commands.name: run
commands.summary: Run a command in the project environment

commands.name: export
commands.summary: Export the lockfile to an alternate format
